channel.title: imisofts Blog
channel.description: Expert insights on AI automation, web development, digital marketing, and business growth strategies

item.title: Claude Cowork Goes Web and Mobile, and 90 Percent of Its Use Is Not Coding
item.description: Anthropic rolls Claude Cowork out to web and mobile with background sessions and scheduled tasks that run with no device online. What SMBs should delegate.

item.title: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna Go Public Today, 13 Days After the Government Gate
item.description: OpenAI takes GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna public on July 9 after a 13 day government safety review. Pricing, what changed, and the routing math to re-run now.

item.title: GoHighLevel Workflows Now React to Your Team: User Replied Triggers, SLA Timeouts and RCS
item.description: GoHighLevel adds User Replied triggers, SLA wait timeouts and goal events, plus RCS workflow actions in private beta. The speed to lead setup agencies need.

item.title: Best Cold Calling Software in 2026 (Dialers Compared for Outbound Sales)
item.description: The best cold calling software in 2026 compared: Apollo, Orum, Nooks, PhoneBurner, Kixie, and JustCall, with real 2026 pricing, dialer types, and honest pros and cons for outbound sales teams.

item.title: Shopify's 2026-07 Release Is Live: Market-Driven Shipping, Draft Order Deposits and Three Deadlines
item.description: Shopify's 2026-07 wave landed July 1: market-driven shipping preview, native B2B deposits, UCP cart migration, plus Oct 1 and Dec 1 app deadlines. What to do.

item.title: Chinese AI Models Are Winning US Workloads on Price, and Washington Just Noticed
item.description: CNBC: Chinese AI models hit up to 46% of US usage on OpenRouter as costs bite, at 18 cents vs 4 dollars per million tokens. The savings, risks and playbook.

item.title: The EU Ended Duty-Free Parcels on July 1: What the 3 Euro Customs Fee Means for Cross-Border Sellers
item.description: The EU now charges a 3 euro customs duty per tariff line on parcels up to 150 euros. Who pays, how it works, the 2028 cliff, and a 5-step seller playbook.

item.title: Best Google Maps Scrapers in 2026 (Tested for Lead Generation)
item.description: The best Google Maps scrapers in 2026 compared for lead generation: Apify, Outscraper, Bright Data, Octoparse, flat rate tools, and the official Places API, with real costs and honest pros and cons.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 Leaves Your Subscription Tomorrow: The July 8 Usage-Credits Switch and What to Do Today
item.description: July 7 is the last day Claude Fable 5 is included in Pro, Max, and Team plans. From July 8 it bills via usage credits at $10/$50 per M tokens. Act today.

item.title: Meta's SWE-Together Benchmark Ranks AI Coding Agents by How Little Human Steering They Need
item.description: Meta researchers released SWE-Together, a 109 task benchmark built from real coding agent sessions. Claude Opus 4.8 leads and needs the fewest corrections.

item.title: Zoom Is Buying Common Room: The Buying Signal Layer Is Consolidating Into the Big Sales Platforms
item.description: Zoom will acquire Common Room, announced July 2, 2026. Why the buying signal layer is consolidating into sales platforms and the outbound operator playbook.

item.title: Global Startup Funding Hit a Record $510B in H1 2026, and Two AI Labs Took 43% of It
item.description: Crunchbase: H1 2026 startup funding hit a record $510B, beating all of 2025. OpenAI and Anthropic took 43%. What the concentration means for SMBs and founders.

item.title: Claude Enterprise Gets Admin Analytics, Model Entitlements, and Spend Alerts: AI Cost Governance Becomes Product
item.description: Anthropic shipped richer admin analytics, model level entitlements, and spend alerts for Claude Enterprise on July 2. The AI cost control surface to copy.

item.title: ChatGPT Workspace Agents Start Costing Credits Today: The Agent Unit Economics Playbook
item.description: ChatGPT workspace agent credit pricing takes effect July 6, 2026. How credits are calculated, the cached input discount, and a day one cost control playbook.

item.title: GoHighLevel vs HubSpot 2026: Which CRM Wins (Honest Comparison)
item.description: GoHighLevel vs HubSpot in 2026: an honest, side-by-side comparison of pricing, features, white-label resale, and who each CRM is really for. See which one wins for agencies and in-house teams.

item.title: The 7 Best Sales Engagement Platforms in 2026 (Honest Comparison)
item.description: The 7 best sales engagement platforms in 2026, honestly compared: Apollo, Outreach, Salesloft, Reply.io, HubSpot Sales Hub, Salesforce, and Klenty, with real pricing and the catch for each.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 Brings Frontier Agents Down to Commodity Prices: The Operator Playbook
item.description: Claude Sonnet 5 launched June 30 with near Opus 4.8 agentic performance at $2 per million input tokens through August 31. The cost math and operator playbook.

item.title: xAI Launches Grok Voice Agent Builder: No-Code Phone Agents at 5 Cents a Minute
item.description: xAI's Voice Agent Builder went live July 1: no-code phone agents on Grok Voice at $0.05 a minute with telephony, tools, and guardrails built in. What to know.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 Is Back for Everyone: The July 7 Usage Deadline and a New Industry Jailbreak Standard
item.description: Claude Fable 5 is restored globally with included usage until July 7, a new safety classifier, and an industry jailbreak severity framework with Big Tech.

item.title: AppSumo Review 2026: Is It Legit and Are Lifetime Deals Safe?
item.description: Is AppSumo legit in 2026? An honest review of the 60-day refund policy, Plus membership, Select protection, the real risks of lifetime deals, and how to buy safely.

item.title: Seamless Now Powers HubSpot's Breeze Prospecting Agent: Net-New Contact Sourcing Lands Inside the CRM Agent
item.description: Seamless launched a July 1 integration inside HubSpot's Breeze Prospecting Agent, adding net-new contact sourcing, inbox enrollment, and credit-based costs.

item.title: GoHighLevel July 1 Updates: Prospecting Auto-Enriches Contacts and Finds Decision Makers, WhatsApp Comes to Bookings
item.description: GoHighLevel's July 1 changelog turns Prospecting into an enrichment engine with website scraping and POC discovery, plus WhatsApp booking notifications.

item.title: Copilot Billing Is Live and ChatGPT Agent Credits Start July 6: The Metered AI Cost Playbook for Agencies and SMBs
item.description: Microsoft Copilot Cowork usage billing went live July 1 and ChatGPT agent credits begin July 6. How agencies and SMBs cap, forecast, and price metered AI now.

item.title: Claude Hits GA in Microsoft Foundry and Adds a Cross Cloud Control Plane
item.description: Claude is generally available in Microsoft Foundry, and a new apps gateway runs Claude Code across Bedrock, Google Cloud, and Foundry with SSO and spend caps.

item.title: US Lifts Export Controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5; Access Returns July 1
item.description: The US Commerce Department lifted export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 on June 30, ending an 18 day blackout. Access is being restored July 1.

item.title: Shopify Scripts Went Dark June 30: The July 1 Checkout Recovery Playbook
item.description: Shopify Scripts stopped executing on June 30, 2026. Here is how to detect the silent checkout failures now and recover fast by migrating to Functions.

item.title: Is Apollo.io Worth It in 2026? An Honest Cost and ROI Breakdown
item.description: Is Apollo.io worth it in 2026? An honest look at the real costs, credits, data accuracy, who it pays off for, and who should skip it, from a B2B lead-gen team.

item.title: Apify vs Firecrawl (2026): Which Web Scraping Tool Wins?
item.description: Apify vs Firecrawl in 2026: an honest head-to-head on pricing, structured data vs LLM-ready text, lead generation, and which web scraping tool to pick (or use both).

item.title: Answer Engine Optimization: How B2B Brands Get Recommended by AI in 2026
item.description: If buyers now ask AI to shortlist vendors, the goal is to be the name it returns. A 2026 playbook for getting cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

item.title: Outbound Shifts From Volume to Precision in 2026, New Benchmarks Show
item.description: 2026 outbound benchmarks point one way: precision over volume. Cold email reply rates keep falling while verified data and multichannel timing win meetings.

item.title: B2B Buyers Now Start Vendor Research in AI, Then Validate With a Human
item.description: Forrester and Gartner 2026 data: B2B buyers start vendor research in AI, then validate with a rep. What the AI first buying journey means for your pipeline.

item.title: OpenAI Data: AI Agents Now Do Hours of Real Work, and Non-Developers Lead Adoption
item.description: A new OpenAI research paper shows agents now handle multi-hour tasks and non-developer use is up 137x. Why the agentic automation window is open now.

item.title: US Clears Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 for Limited Release to Vetted Institutions
item.description: On June 26 the US government partly lifted its block on Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5, clearing release to 100+ vetted institutions. What it signals for you.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna Launch Behind a Government Gate
item.description: OpenAI previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna on June 26, but US rules limit access to about 20 partners. What it means for your AI stack and budget.

item.title: Google Reportedly Delays Gemini 3.5 Pro to July: Do Not Build Around an Unshipped Model
item.description: Multiple reports say Google pushed Gemini 3.5 Pro to July 2026; Google declined to comment. Why operators should not architect around an unshipped model.

item.title: OpenAI Unveils Jalapeno, Its First Inference Chip, in a Bet on Cheaper AI Compute
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom unveiled Jalapeno, OpenAI's first inference chip, on June 24. What the race for cheaper AI compute means for your automation roadmap.

item.title: Agentjacking: How a Fake Bug Report Hijacks AI Coding Agents, and How to Defend Yours
item.description: Tenet Security's Agentjacking attack hijacks AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex through a fake error report. What it means and how to defend.

item.title: Is GoHighLevel Worth It in 2026? The Honest Break-Even Math
item.description: Is GoHighLevel worth it in 2026? An honest break-even analysis: what it really costs, how few clients pay it off, where the ROI comes from, and who should not buy it.

item.title: AWS Launches Continuum and Context to Put Guardrails and Business Knowledge Around AI Agents
item.description: At AWS Summit New York, Amazon launched Continuum and Context: a security agent that earns autonomy and a knowledge graph that gives agents real business context.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot Cowork Goes GA With Usage Based Pricing, and a June 30 Billing Deadline
item.description: Microsoft Copilot Cowork is generally available and now bills per task with Copilot Credits. Early access tenants must set up usage billing by June 30.

item.title: Gartner: AI Agent Spending Triples to $206 Billion in 2026, but 40 Percent of Projects Will Be Canceled
item.description: Gartner sees AI agent software spending tripling to $206.5 billion in 2026, yet over 40 percent of agentic projects get canceled. The discipline that ships.

item.title: How to Scrape Leads With Apify in 2026 (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.description: How to scrape leads with Apify in 2026: pick the right Actor, configure a tight search, run it, then enrich and verify emails before you send. Free-tier walkthrough.

item.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Tag: AI Agents Move Into Your Team's Slack
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Tag lets teams tag @Claude in Slack to delegate work, with scoped access, audit logs, and spend limits. What it means for operators.

item.title: Shopify Scripts Shut Off June 30: Your 6 Day Migration Checklist
item.description: Shopify Scripts stop executing June 30, 2026 with no grace period. Here is what breaks at checkout and the exact steps to migrate to Functions in time.

item.title: AI Shoppers Now Outconvert Humans, but Most Stores Are Invisible to Them
item.description: AI referred shoppers now convert better than human visitors, per Adobe, yet most retail product pages are unreadable to AI agents. The 2026 readiness playbook.

item.title: GTM Engineering Is Replacing the Volume SDR Model in 2026 Outbound
item.description: GTM engineering is reshaping B2B outbound in 2026: one engineer with AI and buying signals can outproduce a team of SDRs. What it means for your pipeline.

item.title: AI-Written Cold Emails Now Underperform Human Ones in 2026
item.description: AI-written cold emails now reply lower than human ones in 2026 benchmarks. Use AI for research and timing, not the voice. What it means for your outbound.

item.title: OpenAI's Codex Guide Targets Long-Running, Multi-Step AI Work
item.description: OpenAI's new whitepaper, Codex-maxxing for long-running work, shows how to keep an AI agent on track across multi-step projects. Here is the operator takeaway.

item.title: Best Lifetime SaaS Deals in 2026: Where to Find Them and How to Buy Smart
item.description: The best lifetime SaaS deals in 2026: where to find them (AppSumo, DealMirror, Dealify), how to spot a deal worth buying, and the risks nobody mentions.

item.title: ChatGPT Workspace Agents Arrive for Business Teams
item.description: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Workspace Agents to Business plans: build agents for repeatable tasks across Slack, Drive, and more. Free through July 6, 2026.

item.title: Shazeer Joins OpenAI, Jumper Joins Anthropic as the AI Talent War Heats Up
item.description: Transformer co inventor Noam Shazeer left Google for OpenAI and Nobel laureate John Jumper left DeepMind for Anthropic. What the AI talent war means for you.

item.title: OpenAI's Record and Replay Turns Any Workflow Into an AI Skill
item.description: OpenAI's Record and Replay lets you demonstrate a task once and Codex turns it into a reusable AI skill. What demonstration based automation means for SMBs.

item.description: The best AI automation tools in 2026, ranked by job. Honest 2026 pricing and the catch for n8n, Zapier, Make, Lindy, Apify, GoHighLevel, and Apollo.

item.description: The best CRM for agencies in 2026, ranked by agency type. Honest pricing and the catch for GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, Close, Keap, and monday CRM.

item.title: Google Puts AI Agents Inside Workspace, and Hands Admins the Controls
item.description: Starting June 17, Google rolled agentic Gemini features deeper into Workspace and Chrome Enterprise, alongside new admin controls to govern how staff use them.

item.title: Anthropic Makes Static API Keys Optional With Workload Identity Federation
item.description: Anthropic made Workload Identity Federation GA on June 17, replacing static Claude API keys with short-lived, scoped credentials from your identity provider.

item.description: HubSpot's June update gives Breeze Agents MCP access to G2, Gong, Linear and Amplitude, and sets a July 13 custom-assistant migration to Breeze projects.

item.description: In 2026, MCP lets Claude and ChatGPT run your cold email and prospecting tools by conversation. What is real, which tools have it, and how to adopt it safely.

item.description: Salesforce's Summer 26 release goes live June 15 with multi agent orchestration in Agentforce. Here is what small teams should copy without the enterprise bill.

item.description: Moonshot released Kimi K2.7 Code as open weights on June 12. Here is when a self hostable coding model is worth it for your business, and when it is not.

item.description: On June 12 a US government directive forced Anthropic to suspend Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5. Here is how to keep your AI running when a model goes dark.

item.description: Honest Apify review for 2026: real pricing from free to $999, how compute units and pay-per-result Actors work, pros, cons, alternatives and who should buy it.

item.description: Google AI Ultra, ChatGPT Pro and Claude Max now all sit at 100 dollars a month, Gemini CLI sunsets June 18, and Gemini 3.5 Pro ships this month. What to budget.

item.description: OpenAI pulled back ChatGPT Instant Checkout after fewer than 15 merchants went live. The agentic commerce lesson for stores: get discoverable, own checkout.

item.description: AI agents are moving into production in 2026. CTERA's n8n integration, Contentstack's Agent OS, and Zscaler show the bottleneck is plumbing, not the model.

item.title: AI Agents Are Revolutionizing SMB Operations
item.description: How AI automation is transforming small business growth in 2025. Discover strategies that 91% of SMBs are using to boost revenue and reduce operational costs by up to 60%.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: How AI Automation Saves Businesses 60% on Operations
item.description: Discover how AI automation can dramatically reduce operational costs while improving efficiency and accuracy.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: The Complete Guide to Cold Email Infrastructure
item.description: Learn how to set up professional cold email infrastructure that delivers 95%+ inbox rates.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: Modern Web Development: Next.js vs React
item.description: A comprehensive comparison of Next.js and React for modern web application development.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)
